reviews.comment:
Muy buena la atencion no se hace diferencia  por marcas de coches somos  todos iguales tixos clientes

(Translated by Google)
The service is excellent; they don't discriminate based on car brand, we're all the same, our customers.

Excellent service at Javier's pit box; we've been taking our cars there for years. Everything is impeccable.

reviews.comment:
Terrible lentitud en atender mas de media hora para cargar nafta teniendo tan solo un auto adelante, se ve que muchos ya saben de esta deficiencia, el bar de terror tres colas para comprar, para pagar, para pedir para que te entreguen, no tienen ningún apuro
Debo pedir disculpas me confundí la estación de servicio, con la de la Ruta 2 en Dolores, todo lo contrario esta estación de servicio brinda un verdadero y eficiente servicio, la utilizo a menudo y trato de ir a ella por su buen servicio tanto de playa como en el "Full" lamento profundamente mi error

(Translated by Google)
Terriblely slow service; it took over half an hour to fill up with gas, even with only one car ahead of me. It seems many people are already aware of this problem. The gas station was a nightmare: three lines to buy, to pay, to order, and then to get your gas. They were in no hurry.
I must apologize; I confused this gas station with the one on Route 2 in Dolores. On the contrary, this station provides truly efficient service. I use it often and try to go there because of its excellent service both at the pump and at the full station. I deeply regret my mistake.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7368196998032183080/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURoNlBpaXpBRRAB
